chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3630 - وَ قَالَ اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "مَلْعُونٌ مَلْعُونٌ مَنْ يُضَيِّعُ مَنْ يَعُولُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3630 - The Prophet (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"Cursed, cursed is the one who neglects those he is responsible for."
